allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Wine Tracker app

Features:
- Wine inventory with vintages, prices, tastings
- Import parser for semi-structured notes and receipts
- Quick tasting entry
- Search and filter by color
- Mobile-friendly React frontend

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(wc -l echo "  \(above is number of output lines\)" __NEW_LINE_97637073fd0b206a__ echo "4. First Wine Sample:" curl -s https://winetracker.onrender.com/api/wines/1)
Bash(VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build 2>&1 && cp -r dist/* ../backend/public/)
Bash(cd /Users/kenrosen/Documents/Projects/WineTracker1 && source backend/.env && railway variables set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" 2>&1)

Bash(BASE="https://wine-tracker-backend-production.up.railway.app/api"

echo "=== TEST 5: GET /api/wines/favorites/list?minRating=1&availableOnly=true ==="
curl -s "$BASE/wines/favorites/list?minRating=1&availableOnly=true" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
clean = re.sub\(r'[\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]', ' ', raw\)
wines = json.loads\(clean\)
test_wines = [w for w in wines if w['name'].startswith\('__TEST_AVAIL_'\)]
print\(f'Found {len\(test_wines\)} test wines in favorites:'\)
for w in test_wines:
    print\(f'  - {w[\\"name\\"]} \(id={w[\\"id\\"]}\)'\)
if len\(test_wines\) == 1 and test_wines[0]['name'] == '__TEST_AVAIL_PartialWine':
    print\('PASS: AllUnavailWine correctly filtered out'\)
elif len\(test_wines\) == 0:
    print\('FAIL: No test wines found \(both filtered?\)'\)
else:
    names = [w['name'] for w in test_wines]
    print\(f'FAIL: Expected only PartialWine, got: {names}'\)
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 6: GET /api/vintages/favorites/list?minRating=1&availableOnly=true ==="
curl -s "$BASE/vintages/favorites/list?minRating=1&availableOnly=true" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
clean = re.sub\(r'[\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]', ' ', raw\)
vintages = json.loads\(clean\)
test_vintages = [v for v in vintages if v.get\('wine',{}\).get\('name',''\).startswith\('__TEST_AVAIL_'\)]
print\(f'Found {len\(test_vintages\)} test vintages in favorites:'\)
for v in test_vintages:
    print\(f'  - {v[\\"wine\\"][\\"name\\"]} {v[\\"vintageYear\\"]} notAvailable={v.get\(\\"notAvailable\\"\)}'\)
# Should only see the available vintage \(2020 on PartialWine\)
if len\(test_vintages\) == 1 and test_vintages[0]['vintageYear'] == 2020 and test_vintages[0].get\('notAvailable'\) == False:
    print\('PASS: Only available vintage returned'\)
elif len\(test_vintages\) == 0:
    print\('FAIL: No test vintages found'\)
else:
    print\(f'FAIL: Expected only 2020 available vintage'\)
")

Bash(BASE="https://wine-tracker-backend-production.up.railway.app/api"

echo "=== TEST 5 \(re-run\): wines/favorites with availableOnly=true ==="
curl -s "$BASE/wines/favorites/list?minRating=1&availableOnly=true&limit=200" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
clean = re.sub\(r'[\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]', ' ', raw\)
wines = json.loads\(clean\)
test = [w for w in wines if w['name'].startswith\('__TEST_AVAIL_'\)]
print\(f'Test wines: {len\(test\)}'\)
for w in test:
    print\(f'  {w[\\"name\\"]} avgRating={w[\\"averageRating\\"]}'\)
if len\(test\) == 1 and test[0]['name'] == '__TEST_AVAIL_PartialWine':
    print\('PASS'\)
else:
    print\(f'FAIL: Expected only PartialWine, got {[w[\\"name\\"] for w in test]}'\)
"

echo ""

curl -s "$BASE/vintages/favorites/list?minRating=1&availableOnly=true&limit=200" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re

Bash(BASE="https://wine-tracker-backend-production.up.railway.app/api"

echo "=== TEST 10: GET /api/wines response structure ==="
curl -s "$BASE/wines" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
clean = re.sub\(r'[\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]', ' ', raw\)
wines = json.loads\(clean\)
w = wines[0]
keys = set\(w.keys\(\)\)
expected = {'id', 'name', 'color', 'vintages', 'createdAt'}
missing = expected - keys
print\(f'Wine keys: {sorted\(keys\)}'\)
# Check vintage structure
v = w['vintages'][0] if w.get\('vintages'\) else None
if v:
    vkeys = set\(v.keys\(\)\)
    print\(f'Vintage keys: {sorted\(vkeys\)}'\)
    has_not_avail = 'notAvailable' in vkeys
    has_tastings = 'tastingEvents' in vkeys
    print\(f'Has notAvailable: {has_not_avail}'\)
    print\(f'Has tastingEvents: {has_tastings}'\)
if not missing:
    print\('PASS: All expected fields present'\)
else:
    print\(f'FAIL: Missing fields: {missing}'\)
"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 11: GET /api/wines/favorites/list response structure ==="
curl -s "$BASE/wines/favorites/list?minRating=1&limit=5" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
clean = re.sub\(r'[\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]', ' ', raw\)
wines = json.loads\(clean\)
w = wines[0]
keys = set\(w.keys\(\)\)
expected = {'id', 'name', 'color', 'vintages', 'averageRating', 'tastingCount'}
missing = expected - keys
print\(f'Favorites wine keys: {sorted\(keys\)}'\)
print\(f'averageRating present: {\\"averageRating\\" in keys}'\)
print\(f'tastingCount present: {\\"tastingCount\\" in keys}'\)
if not missing:
    print\('PASS: All expected fields present'\)
else:
    print\(f'FAIL: Missing fields: {missing}'\)
")
